evidence: Shivam: 'instead of just sharing resumes, which is the common practice we see in tech recruiters and whatnot, we want to go up the value chain and potentially leverage career span if it can integrate into the workflow'

Shivam: 'people say outsourcing, but it's a full captive center that the US company owns and is operating... Harvey AI Anthropic OpenAI are building teams in India. And so we're building teams in that structure.'

Ilse: 'people hiring in America have expectations that you can talk about yourself like this... it's unfortunately necessary in the US job market. And I think that's a really powerful thing to sell people that it's practice. You just gotta do it.'
V: 'as you know we're trying to sell this sucker. Or at least we're trying to get Ilsa and I sold. And guaranteed we'll make sure to sort of figure out a way to grandfather you guys in'

Shivam: 'This I think is the beginning of that value chain. And that's kind of what this first step is right into XYZ and then from there I think it, you know, we hand off to the Career span, platform, technology'
V: 'the ability to advertise it matters the most... I think for us that's sort of the main thing is getting us as an exhibition... we're basically not optimizing for revenue'
Shivam: 'India is basically the back office right now. They're doing more critical work... Amazon just invested 50 billion in India'
V: 'I'm really hoping that we can help your time to place it down because I'm assuming that will be a big competitive advantage like being able to produce names within a day'
Shivam: 'our company is building a really strong pool of engineering talent and teams across India... recently we set up a 20, 30 person team'

Shivam: 'Which is more interesting to you? The company side or the candidate side?' V: 'More so the candidate side. I mean the company side is like great. But if we don't have to deal with it, we really would rather not.'

Ilse: 'I'm adding in additional limitations for employers that limits the number of scan requests they can have at once... I already have a credit based system but gave him 100 credits. There's currently nothing to stop them from doing all hundred then and there.'

V: 'I have largely finalized the one pagers... These are the overall argument that we're making and the proof points that we'll be using... they're of pretty decent quality. They are largely synthesizing. It actually did a pretty decent job of objections and rebuttals'

source_display: User Control Over Job Search Inclusion
evidence: Ilse: 'I'm adding some stuff to the user's settings page that actually lets them control whether or not they want to be included in job search stuff because before now it's just been the toggle during sign up and you could never change it again'
V: 'We need to scale the outbound... I'll talk to the board.'
V: 'I don't mind introducing you to all of the Marvin founders. We already have an in with Marvin. We have a partnership.'
